choices.text: Rust + Anchor framework. Rust compiles to BPF bytecode. Anchor (cargo install + avm) provides scaffolding, account constraints, IDL generation, testing. avm install latest; anchor init project.
solana-test-validator runs local network on localhost:8899; instant blocks; pre-loaded SOL. anchor test --skip-local-validator if running separately. Faster than devnet + no airdrops needed.

questions.explanation: Local validator for fast dev cycle.
